name: gameface-unsupported-features
description: Generates a structured JSON inventory of CSS, HTML, and JS features supported by the Gameface renderer.

scripts.probe: tsc && DEBUG=oclif:gameface-e2e* gameface-e2e --config=gameface-e2e-config-selectors.js && DEBUG=oclif:gameface-e2e* gameface-e2e && DEBUG=oclif:gameface-e2e* gameface-e2e --config=gameface-e2e-config-functions.js
scripts.probe:clean: rimraf dist results && npm run probe
